pages.text: Cast a $(l)Sharpening Stone$() (1 ingot) for tools or a $(l)Polishing Stone$() (2 ingots) for armor, then combine with your gear at an anvil.$(br2)Each stone restores a quarter of max durability; the anvil only consumes what the damage needs.
pages.title: Stones

pages.text: A stone only works gear at or below its material's harvest level — wood cannot hold an edge on netherite.$(br2)Broken armor $(l)never shatters$(): it stays equipped, granting nothing, until you repair it back to life.
pages.title: Tier Matters
